summary: COMPARISON two Axes, same 30-day exponential data y=3·1.28^t. LEFT BLUE linear y-axis (0..6000) shows classic 'flat then exploding' curve via BLUE Dots + Axes.plot. RIGHT GREEN log10-y axis shows a perfect straight line. MathTex captions: y=3r^t vs log y = log 3 + t log r. YELLOW bottom note: slope of log line = log10(1.28) ≈ 0.107 — a constant slope that reveals the growth rate.
